controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - concentration risk management) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks -
Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - concentration risk management) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect immediately upon issuance
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect immediately upon issuance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to small finance banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Small Finance Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to small finance banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meaning assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall bear the
meaning assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meaning assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs

controls.control_objective: To ensure comprise tier i and tier ii capital as defined in the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2
controls.control_description:
<image>
(2) 2[*****]
(3) "Capital Funds for exposure norms" shall comprise Tier I and Tier II capital as
defined in the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital
Adequacy) Directions, 2025, and as per the published accounts as on March 31 of the
previous year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comprise tier i and tier ii capital as defined in the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure from taking exposure in excess of the ceiling in anticipation of infusion of capital at a future date
controls.control_description:
Banks are also prohibited from taking exposure in excess of the ceiling in
anticipation of infusion of capital at a future date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to from taking exposure in excess of the ceiling in anticipation of infusion of capital at a future date

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined in the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - credit facilities) directions, 2025 (3b) "collateral security" or
controls.control_description:
3[(3A) "Capital Market Intermediaries (CMIs)" shall have the same meaning as defined in
the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025
(3B) "Collateral Security" or 'Collateral' shall have the same meaning as defined in the
Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025]
(4) "Exposure" shall include credit exposure (funded and non-funded credit limits) and
investment exposure (including underwriting and similar commitments).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined in the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - credit facilities) directions, 2025 (3b) "collateral security" or

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for arriving at the exposure limit
controls.control_description:
The sanctioned
limits or outstandings, whichever are higher, shall be reckoned for arriving at the exposure
limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be reckoned for arriving at the exposure limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure reckon the outstanding as the exposure
controls.control_description:
However, in the case of fully drawn term loans, where there is no scope for re-drawal
of any portion of the sanctioned limit, banks may reckon the outstanding as the exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reckon the outstanding as the exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned as under: explanation: explanation: entities defined under group for a small finance bank shall be subject to the licensing conditions and
controls.control_description:
The credit exposure, investment exposure and exposure for derivative products shall be
reckoned as under:
Explanation:
Explanation: Entities defined under Group for a Small Finance Bank shall be
subject to the Licensing Conditions and other regulatory restrictions on them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned as under: explanation: explanation: entities defined under group for a small finance bank shall be subject to the licensing conditions and

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have been
assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India
Act, 1934 or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as used in commercial
parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod

controls.control_objective: To ensure have policies on concentration risk management of their exposures towards a single counterparty, groups of interconnected counterparties, specific sec
controls.control_description:
10[Banks shall have policies on Concentration Risk Management of their exposures
towards a single counterparty, groups of interconnected counterparties, specific sectors of
the economy as also systems to monitor and address the risks emanating to them from
their exposures to ultra-large borrowers who are excessively leveraged and have
substantial borrowings from the banking system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have policies on concentration risk management of their exposures towards a single counterparty, groups of interconnected counterparties, specific sec

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into account inter alia the overall borrowings of such entities from the banking system for credit assessment of such borrowers
controls.control_description:
While banks can have their own criteria
for deciding an ultra-large borrower, they shall take into account inter alia the overall
borrowings of such entities from the banking system for credit assessment of such
borrowers.] A list of the Board approved policies / limits to be formulated / set by the bank
as well as reviews to be carried out by / put up to the Board are given below, with the details
outlined in the ensuing paragraphs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take into account inter alia the overall borrowings of such entities from the banking system for credit assessment of such borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put up / made to the board:
controls.control_description:
(2) Review by / reporting to the Board - The following reviews and reporting shall be
put up / made to the Board:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put up / made to the board:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be exempted from the exposure ceiling of 10 per cent of its capital funds applicable to single obligor
controls.control_description:
A bank's exposures to QCCPs related to clearing activities shall be exempted from
the exposure ceiling of 10 per cent of its capital funds applicable to single obligor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be exempted from the exposure ceiling of 10 per cent of its capital funds applicable to single obligor

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the exposure ceiling of 10 per cent of its capital funds applicable to single obligor
controls.control_description:
A bank's exposure to non-QCCPs shall be subject to the exposure ceiling of 10 per
cent of its capital funds applicable to single obligor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the exposure ceiling of 10 per cent of its capital funds applicable to single obligor

controls.control_objective: To ensure be higher than 10 per cent and 15 per cent of its capital funds, respectively
controls.control_description:
A bank's loan size and investment exposure to a single NBFC and group NBFC
obligor shall not be higher than 10 per cent and 15 per cent of its capital funds, respectively.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be higher than 10 per cent and 15 per cent of its capital funds, respectively

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated as the sum of all purchase obligations (pay-in of funds) less the sum of all sale obligations (pay-out of funds) for a specific client w
controls.control_description:
A.2.2.2 Exposure to an NBFC predominantly engaged in lending against collateral of
gold jewellery
Explanation 1: Net settlement obligation shall be calculated as the sum of all
purchase obligations (pay-in of funds) less the sum of all sale obligations
(pay-out of funds) for a specific client within the same settlement cycle.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated as the sum of all purchase obligations (pay-in of funds) less the sum of all sale obligations (pay-out of funds) for a specific client w

controls.control_objective: To ensure be only permitted where both the buy and sell transactions are cleared through the same clearing corporation
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be only permitted where both the buy and sell transactions are cleared through the same clearing corporation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be offset by cash and governments securities
controls.control_description:
The exposure computed as per paragraph 40A above may be offset by cash and
Governments securities, subject to conditions and haircuts as prescribed in the
Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks- Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy)
Directions, 2025, for arriving at the CME.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be offset by cash and governments securities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be higher than 10 per cent and 15 per cent of its capital funds, respectively
controls.control_description:
A bank's credit and investment exposure to a single and group obligor shall not be
higher than 10 per cent and 15 per cent of its capital funds, respectively.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be higher than 10 per cent and 15 per cent of its capital funds, respectively

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that at least 50 per cent of its loan portfolio should constitute loans and advances of up to ₹ 25 lakh on an ongoing basis
controls.control_description:
Additionally, the bank shall ensure that at least 50 per cent of its loan portfolio should
constitute loans and advances of up to ₹ 25 lakh on an ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that at least 50 per cent of its loan portfolio should constitute loans and advances of up to ₹ 25 lakh on an ongoing basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be borrower wise
controls.control_description:
Further, the criteria of upper limit of ₹ 25 lakh shall
be borrower wise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be borrower wise

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider fixing internal limits for aggregate commitments to specific sectors, e
controls.control_description:
In addition to limiting exposures to a single or group borrowers, a bank shall consider
fixing internal limits for aggregate commitments to specific sectors, e.g.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider fixing internal limits for aggregate commitments to specific sectors, e

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fixed based on the bank's assessment of sectoral performance and associated risk perceptions
controls.control_description:
These sectoral limits shall be fixed based on
the bank's assessment of sectoral performance and associated risk perceptions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fixed based on the bank's assessment of sectoral performance and associated risk perceptions

controls.control_objective: To ensure review and revise these limits periodically, as deemed appropriate
controls.control_description:
The bank
shall review and revise these limits periodically, as deemed appropriate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review and revise these limits periodically, as deemed appropriate

controls.control_objective: To ensure have board approved limits in respect of various sub-segments under consumer credit as may be considered necessary by the board as part of prudent ris
controls.control_description:
A bank shall have Board approved limits in respect of various sub-segments under
consumer credit as may be considered necessary by the Board as part of prudent risk
management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have board approved limits in respect of various sub-segments under consumer credit as may be considered necessary by the board as part of prudent ris

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prescribed for all unsecured consumer credit exposures
controls.control_description:
In particular, limits shall be prescribed for all unsecured consumer credit
exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prescribed for all unsecured consumer credit exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be strictly adhered to and monitored on an ongoing basis by the risk management committee
controls.control_description:
The limits so fixed shall be strictly adhered to and monitored on an ongoing
basis by the Risk Management Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be strictly adhered to and monitored on an ongoing basis by the risk management committee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as unsecured loans for credit appraisal, prudential limits and exposure purposes
controls.control_description:
All top-up loans extended by a bank against movable assets which are inherently
depreciating in nature, such as vehicles, shall be treated as unsecured loans for credit
appraisal, prudential limits and exposure purposes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as unsecured loans for credit appraisal, prudential limits and exposure purposes

controls.control_objective: To ensure also consider fixing internal limits for its aggregate exposure to all nbfcs put together
controls.control_description:
A bank may also consider fixing internal limits for its aggregate exposure to all
NBFCs put together.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also consider fixing internal limits for its aggregate exposure to all nbfcs put together

controls.control_objective: To ensure have an internal sub-limit on its aggregate exposures to all nbfcs, having gold loans to the extent of 50 per cent or more of their total financial as
controls.control_description:
The bank should have an internal sub-limit on its aggregate exposures to all NBFCs,
having gold loans to the extent of 50 per cent or more of their total financial assets, taken
together.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to have an internal sub-limit on its aggregate exposures to all nbfcs, having gold loans to the extent of 50 per cent or more of their total financial as

controls.control_objective: To ensure be within the internal limit
controls.control_description:
This sub-limit should be within the internal limit, where fixed by the bank for its
aggregate exposure to all NBFCs put together as mentioned in paragraph 25.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be within the internal limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - credit facilities) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
A bank shall be guided by the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Credit
Facilities) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - credit facilities) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure include both its direct exposures and indirect exposures (both fund-based and non-fund-based), including the following: (1) investment exposures: dire
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include both its direct exposures and indirect exposures (both fund-based and non-fund-based), including the following: (1) investment exposures: dire

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned as cme
controls.control_description:
13 Deleted with effect from July 01, 2026 consequent to the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Concentration Risk Management) Amendment Directions, 2026 (Revised) dated March 30, 2026 14 Inserted with effect from July 01, 2026 consequent to the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Concentration Risk Management) Amendment Directions, 2026 (Revised) dated March 30, 2026

Provided that, intraday limits to non-debt mutual fund schemes, which are
permitted to borrow intra-day only to the extent of guaranteed receivables
due on the same day on account of (a) maturity proceeds of Government
Securities, T-Bills, SDL or interest from G-Sec and SDLs held by such
mutual funds, or (b) maturity proceeds of TREPS from CCIL, shall not be
reckoned as CME.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned as cme

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold shares in any company, whether as pledgee, mortgagee or absolute owner, of an amount exceeding 30 per cent of the paid-up share capital of that company or 30 per cent of its own paid-up share capital and reserves, whichever is less
controls.control_description:
In terms of Section 19(2) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, no banking company
shall hold shares in any company, whether as pledgee, mortgagee or absolute owner, of
an amount exceeding 30 per cent of the paid-up share capital of that company or 30 per
cent of its own paid-up share capital and reserves, whichever is less, except as provided
in sub-section (1) of Section 19 of the Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold shares in any company, whether as pledgee, mortgagee or absolute owner, of an amount exceeding 30 per cent of the paid-up share capital of that company or 30 per cent of its own paid-up share capital and reserves, whichever is less

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be included for the purpose of determining the exposure limit
controls.control_description:
Shares held in demat form should also be
included for the purpose of determining the exposure limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to also be included for the purpose of determining the exposure limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure strictly adhere to these statutory provisions while granting any advance against shares, underwriting any issue of shares, or acquiring any shares on
controls.control_description:
A bank shall strictly adhere to these statutory provisions while
granting any advance against shares, underwriting any issue of shares, or acquiring any
shares on investment account or even in lieu of debt of any company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strictly adhere to these statutory provisions while granting any advance against shares, underwriting any issue of shares, or acquiring any shares on

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 40 per cent of its tier 1 capital
controls.control_description:
Aggregate CME of a bank shall be subject to the following prudential ceilings ('CME
ceilings'), subject to the exclusions and qualifications as specified in subsequent
paragraphs, to be maintained on an ongoing basis:
(1) The aggregate CME of a bank, on both solo and consolidated basis, shall not
exceed 40 per cent of its Tier 1 capital.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 40 per cent of its tier 1 capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 20 per cent of tier i capital on both solo and consolidated basis
controls.control_description:
(2) A bank's direct capital market exposure, consisting of investment exposures as
per paragraph 28A(1) shall not exceed 20 per cent of Tier I Capital on both solo
and consolidated basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 20 per cent of tier i capital on both solo and consolidated basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a separate sub-limit for intra- day exposures to a single counterparty, as well as an aggregate limit for all intra- day exposures ] 32
controls.control_description:
(3) Within its aggregate CME limit, a bank shall have a separate sub-limit for intra-
day exposures to a single counterparty, as well as an aggregate limit for all intra-
day exposures
]
32.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to have a separate sub-limit for intra- day exposures to a single counterparty, as well as an aggregate limit for all intra- day exposures ] 32

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere the ceilings on an ongoing basis
controls.control_description:
A bank shall adhere the
ceilings on an ongoing basis.]
33.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere the ceilings on an ongoing basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the provisions of section 19(2) of the banking regulation act, 1949
controls.control_description:
Nonetheless, banks
shall comply with the provisions of Section 19(2) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.]
B.1.4.3 Items excluded from Capital Market Exposure of a bank
34.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the provisions of section 19(2) of the banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure be excluded from the cme computation: (1) investment in joint ventures
controls.control_description:
The following exposures of a bank shall be excluded from the CME computation:
(1) Investment in joint ventures;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be excluded from the cme computation: (1) investment in joint ventures

controls.control_objective: To ensure form part of the cme
controls.control_description:
Provided that after listing, any additional exposures taken in the entities covered
in (1) and (2) shall form part of the CME.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to form part of the cme

controls.control_objective: To ensure be computed as under: (1) direct investment shall be calculated at its cost price
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of CME, the value of various exposures shall be computed as under:
(1) Direct investment shall be calculated at its cost price;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be computed as under: (1) direct investment shall be calculated at its cost price

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for cme with reference to sanctioned limits or outstanding, whichever is higher
controls.control_description:
(2) Credit exposures, both fund based, and non-fund based, shall be reckoned
for CME with reference to sanctioned limits or outstanding, whichever is
higher.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned for cme with reference to sanctioned limits or outstanding, whichever is higher

controls.control_objective: To ensure reckon the outstanding as the exposure
controls.control_description:
However, in the case of fully drawn term loans, where there is no
scope for re-drawal of any portion of the sanctioned limit, banks may reckon
the outstanding as the exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reckon the outstanding as the exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure a bank's exposures for the purpose of cme can be calculated at 30 per cent of the intraday limit extended for meeting shortfall arising on account of settlement timing difference in centrally cleared trades placed on behalf of clients
controls.control_description:
Provided that a bank's exposures for the purpose of CME can be calculated
at 30 per cent of the intraday limit extended for meeting shortfall arising on
account of settlement timing difference in centrally cleared trades placed on
behalf of clients, provided the borrower has expected receivables from a

QCCP fully covering such intra-day drawdowns.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to a bank's exposures for the purpose of cme can be calculated at 30 per cent of the intraday limit extended for meeting shortfall arising on account of settlement timing difference in centrally cleared trades placed on behalf of clients

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fully reckoned as cme
controls.control_description:
However, outstanding, if
any, at the end of day shall be fully reckoned as CME.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fully reckoned as cme

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated as per the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
(3) Exposure in respect of equity and commodity derivatives shall be calculated
as per the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Prudential Norms
on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated as per the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included for the purpose of cme as under:
controls.control_description:
(4) Exposures in respect of IPCs issued shall be included for the purpose of CME
as under:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included for the purpose of cme as under:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
A bank shall be guided by the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks -
Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025 in respect of its investments
controls.control_description:
A bank shall be guided by the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks -
Undertaking of Financial Services) Directions, 2025 in respect of its investments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025 in respect of its investments

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer 'safety net' or any such facilities, which would entail commitments to buy the securities from the investors at a pre-determined price during a
controls.control_description:
A bank or its subsidiary shall not offer 'Safety Net' or any such facilities, which would
entail commitments to buy the securities from the investors at a pre-determined price
during a stipulated period, irrespective of the prevailing market price.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer 'safety net' or any such facilities, which would entail commitments to buy the securities from the investors at a pre-determined price during a

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide commitments to buy the securities at pre-determined prices
controls.control_description:
If a bank or its subsidiary provides a buy back arrangement to small investors
subscribing to new issues, such an arrangement shall not provide commitments to buy the
securities at pre-determined prices.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide commitments to buy the securities at pre-determined prices

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined from time to time, keeping in view the prevailing stock market prices for the securities
controls.control_description:
Prices should be determined from time to time, keeping
in view the prevailing stock market prices for the securities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined from time to time, keeping in view the prevailing stock market prices for the securities

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be limited to a moderate proportion of the total issue in terms of the amount and should not exceed 25 per cent of the owned funds of the bank /
controls.control_description:
Commitments should also be
limited to a moderate proportion of the total issue in terms of the amount and should not
exceed 25 per cent of the owned funds of the bank / its subsidiary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be limited to a moderate proportion of the total issue in terms of the amount and should not exceed 25 per cent of the owned funds of the bank /

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be subject to the overall exposure limits which have been or may be prescribed from time to time
controls.control_description:
These commitments
shall also be subject to the overall exposure limits which have been or may be prescribed
from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be subject to the overall exposure limits which have been or may be prescribed from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure include credit exposure (funded and non-funded credit limits) and investment exposure (including underwriting and similar commitments) as detailed in
controls.control_description:
Exposure should include credit exposure (funded and non-funded credit limits) and
investment exposure (including underwriting and similar commitments) as detailed in
paragraph 4(4) of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include credit exposure (funded and non-funded credit limits) and investment exposure (including underwriting and similar commitments) as detailed in

controls.control_objective: To ensure be excluded while computing exposure to group entities
controls.control_description:
However, exposure on account of equity and other
regulatory capital instruments should be excluded while computing exposure to group
entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be excluded while computing exposure to group entities

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the following intra-group exposure limits: (1) single group entity exposure
controls.control_description:
A bank shall adhere to the following intra-group exposure limits:
(1) Single Group Entity Exposure
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the following intra-group exposure limits: (1) single group entity exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to apply on such exposure
controls.control_description:
However, the instructions issued vide the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks -
Undertaking of Financial Services) Directions, 2025 and the Reserve Bank of India (Small
Finance Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025, shall continue
to apply on such exposure, subject to the prohibitions stipulated at paragraph 50.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to apply on such exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by master direction - reserve bank of india (call, notice and term money markets) directions, 2021
controls.control_description:
However,
prudential limits in respect of outstanding borrowing transactions in call / notice money
market for a bank shall continue to be governed by Master Direction - Reserve Bank of
India (Call, Notice and Term Money Markets) Directions, 2021.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by master direction - reserve bank of india (call, notice and term money markets) directions, 2021

controls.control_objective: To ensure be decided by the bank with the approval of its board within the exposure limits prescribed for single / group obligors
controls.control_description:
For outstanding lending
<image>
transactions in the call / notice / term money market, the limits shall be decided by the bank
with the approval of its Board within the exposure limits prescribed for single / group
obligors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be decided by the bank with the approval of its board within the exposure limits prescribed for single / group obligors

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a board-approved comprehensive policy on monitoring and management of ites
controls.control_description:
A bank shall put in place a Board-approved comprehensive policy on monitoring and
management of ITEs.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a board-approved comprehensive policy on monitoring and management of ites

controls.control_objective: To ensure lay down effective systems and processes to identify, assess and report risk concentrations and material ites
controls.control_description:
The policy should lay down effective systems and processes to
identify, assess and report risk concentrations and material ITEs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to lay down effective systems and processes to identify, assess and report risk concentrations and material ites

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into consideration the risks posed to the bank on a standalone basis as a result of such intra-group activities and ensure that exposure to group
controls.control_description:
While framing such policy,
the Board shall take into consideration the risks posed to the bank on a standalone basis
as a result of such intra-group activities and ensure that exposure to group entities are
appropriately captured in measures of the bank's exposures to group entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take into consideration the risks posed to the bank on a standalone basis as a result of such intra-group activities and ensure that exposure to group

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed at least annually
controls.control_description: The policy should be reviewed at least annually.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed at least annually

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at a minimum, include: (1) system of regular review and reporting of material ites to the board for facilitating clear understanding of the ites undertaken and the risks
controls.control_description:
The policy should, at a minimum,
include:
(1) System of regular review and reporting of material ITEs to the Board for facilitating
clear understanding of the ITEs undertaken and the risks, if any, emanating there-
from;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at a minimum, include: (1) system of regular review and reporting of material ites to the board for facilitating clear understanding of the ites undertaken and the risks

controls.control_objective: To ensure address risks arising from ites as strictly as it would address its risk exposures to a third party / non-group entity
controls.control_description:
(2) A requirement that the bank should address risks arising from ITEs as strictly as it
would address its risk exposures to a third party / non-group entity;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to address risks arising from ites as strictly as it would address its risk exposures to a third party / non-group entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure specify the methodology to be followed for transfer pricing mechanism which could be applied to ensure the compliance of the arm's length principle
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specify the methodology to be followed for transfer pricing mechanism which could be applied to ensure the compliance of the arm's length principle

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake third-party dealings with the purpose of supporting the business of group entities unless they are carried out at arm's length and in accord
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake third-party dealings with the purpose of supporting the business of group entities unless they are carried out at arm's length and in accord

controls.control_objective: To ensure be examined by its internal auditors and the same should be checked by statutory auditors on a sample basis to ascertain that intra-group transactions
controls.control_description:
(7) The bank's material intra-group transactions (both fund-based and non-fund based)
should be examined by its internal auditors and the same should be checked by
statutory auditors on a sample basis to ascertain that intra-group transactions
undertaken:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be examined by its internal auditors and the same should be checked by statutory auditors on a sample basis to ascertain that intra-group transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put up to the board by the sanctioning authority with justifications
controls.control_description:
Where the terms and conditions applying to a bank's dealings with group entities are
inconsistent with the benchmarks set for the similarly rated third party / non-group entities
as required under paragraph 52(3), they shall be put up to the Board by the sanctioning
authority with justifications.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put up to the board by the sanctioning authority with justifications

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made available to the rbi at the time of inspection or whenever required
controls.control_description:
The same may be made available to the RBI at the time of
inspection or whenever required.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made available to the rbi at the time of inspection or whenever required

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into cross-default clauses whereby a default by a group entity on an obligation (whether financial or otherwise) is deemed to trigger a default
controls.control_description:
A bank shall not enter into cross-default clauses whereby a default by a group entity
on an obligation (whether financial or otherwise) is deemed to trigger a default of the bank
on its obligations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into cross-default clauses whereby a default by a group entity on an obligation (whether financial or otherwise) is deemed to trigger a default

controls.control_objective: To ensure buy / sell low quality asset (i
controls.control_description:
The bank should not buy / sell low quality asset (i.e., asset overdue / out of order or
classified as NPA by the bank or by RBI or a restructured asset whose terms have been
renegotiated or compromised due to the deteriorating financial condition of the borrower)
from / to group entities except when they are done in accordance with the extant
instructions of RBI, such as sale of Non-Performing Assets (NPAs) to Asset Reconstruction
Companies, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to buy / sell low quality asset (i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accepted as collateral for a loan or extension of credit to, or guarantee, acceptance, or letter of credit issued on behalf of the group entity
controls.control_description:
Further, a low-quality asset should not be accepted as collateral for a loan
or extension of credit to, or guarantee, acceptance, or letter of credit issued on behalf of
the group entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accepted as collateral for a loan or extension of credit to, or guarantee, acceptance, or letter of credit issued on behalf of the group entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ensure that the transactions in low-quality assets with group entities, whether regulated or unregulated, are not done for the purpose of hiding
controls.control_description:
The bank shall also ensure that the transactions in low-quality assets with
group entities, whether regulated or unregulated, are not done for the purpose of hiding
losses or window dressing of balance sheets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also ensure that the transactions in low-quality assets with group entities, whether regulated or unregulated, are not done for the purpose of hiding

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that it has adequate systems and controls in place for identifying, monitoring, managing and reviewing exposures arising from ites
controls.control_description:
The bank shall ensure that it has adequate systems and controls in place for
identifying, monitoring, managing and reviewing exposures arising from ITEs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that it has adequate systems and controls in place for identifying, monitoring, managing and reviewing exposures arising from ites

controls.control_objective: To ensure require a bank to put in place additional internal controls and a more robust risk monitoring, managing, reporting and review mechanism on ites
controls.control_description:
The RBI may
require a bank to put in place additional internal controls and a more robust risk monitoring,
managing, reporting and review mechanism on ITEs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require a bank to put in place additional internal controls and a more robust risk monitoring, managing, reporting and review mechanism on ites

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide support to its group entities so long as such support is undertaken in accordance with the prudential requirements set out in above paragraphs
controls.control_description:
A bank may provide support to its group entities so long as such support is
undertaken in accordance with the prudential requirements set out in above paragraphs in
relation to the policies governing bank's dealings with group entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide support to its group entities so long as such support is undertaken in accordance with the prudential requirements set out in above paragraphs

controls.control_objective: To ensure take ample and cautious measures to avoid giving any impression of its direct or indirect support to group entities unless there are formal legal arra
controls.control_description:
Further, the bank
should take ample and cautious measures to avoid giving any impression of its direct or
indirect support to group entities unless there are formal legal arrangements in place
providing for such support.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take ample and cautious measures to avoid giving any impression of its direct or indirect support to group entities unless there are formal legal arra

controls.control_objective: To ensure account for any funding or liquidity commitment provided to group entities (e
controls.control_description:
While assessing funding needs (especially under stressed situations), the bank
should account for any funding or liquidity commitment provided to group entities (e.g.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to account for any funding or liquidity commitment provided to group entities (e

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - asset liability management) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
The bank shall
be guided by the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Asset Liability
Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - asset liability management) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure affect its own liquidity, either through direct financial impact or through contagion when those entities are faced with liquidity crunch
controls.control_description:
It should also analyse how the liquidity positions of group
entities may affect its own liquidity, either through direct financial impact or through
contagion when those entities are faced with liquidity crunch.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to affect its own liquidity, either through direct financial impact or through contagion when those entities are faced with liquidity crunch

controls.control_objective: To ensure restrict group entities access to liquidity from it and vice versa in case of need
controls.control_description:
Where there is reliance on
<image>
funding support among group entities, it should take into account legal, regulatory or other
limitations that may restrict group entities access to liquidity from it and vice versa in case
of need.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to restrict group entities access to liquidity from it and vice versa in case of need

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish internal limits on intra-group liquidity support to mitigate the risk of contagion from other group entities when these entities are under l
controls.control_description:
The bank should establish internal limits on intra-group liquidity support to mitigate
the risk of contagion from other group entities when these entities are under liquidity stress.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to establish internal limits on intra-group liquidity support to mitigate the risk of contagion from other group entities when these entities are under l

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place group-wide contingency funding plans, liquidity cushions and diversified funding to help group entities when liquidity problems in the gr
controls.control_description:
It may put in place group-wide contingency funding plans, liquidity cushions and diversified
funding to help group entities when liquidity problems in the group arise in line with the
guidelines referred to in paragraph 58.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place group-wide contingency funding plans, liquidity cushions and diversified funding to help group entities when liquidity problems in the gr

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit the following data / information to the rbi (dos, co) in the format and at the frequency prescribed by the dos
controls.control_description:
A bank shall submit the following data / information to the RBI (DOS, CO) in the
format and at the frequency prescribed by the DoS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit the following data / information to the rbi (dos, co) in the format and at the frequency prescribed by the dos

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare and submit a list of the group entities
controls.control_description: (1) The bank shall prepare and submit a list of the group entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to prepare and submit a list of the group entities

controls.control_objective: To ensure include all group entities established and operating in india and those overseas entities with which it has material transactions (threshold for 'mate
controls.control_description:
The list shall include all
group entities established and operating in India and those overseas entities with
which it has material transactions (threshold for 'material' transaction would be ₹10
crore for fund-based transactions and ₹25 crore for non-fund based transaction)
during last three financial years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to include all group entities established and operating in india and those overseas entities with which it has material transactions (threshold for 'mate

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported at the earliest
controls.control_description:
Any exclusion and / or inclusion of group entities
should be reported at the earliest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported at the earliest

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit the details of intra-group support arrangements / agreements (e
controls.control_description:
(2) The bank shall submit the details of intra-group support arrangements / agreements
(e.g.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit the details of intra-group support arrangements / agreements (e

controls.control_objective: To ensure operate within the stipulated limits on an ongoing basis and report its intra-group exposures
controls.control_description:
(3) The bank shall operate within the stipulated limits on an ongoing basis and report its
intra-group exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to operate within the stipulated limits on an ongoing basis and report its intra-group exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported at the earliest as also in the prescribed returns along with the reasons for breach of limits
controls.control_description:
(4) If the intra-group exposures, either at the single entity level or at the aggregate level,
exceed the prudential limits, the same should be reported at the earliest as also in the
prescribed returns along with the reasons for breach of limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported at the earliest as also in the prescribed returns along with the reasons for breach of limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be) until it is brought down within the limit
controls.control_description:
In such situations, the
bank cannot undertake any further intra-group exposure (at the entity or aggregate
level, as the case may be) until it is brought down within the limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be) until it is brought down within the limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed an appropriate timeline within which it should comply with the stipulated limits
controls.control_description:
Further, the bank,
on satisfactory grounds, may be allowed an appropriate timeline within which it should
comply with the stipulated limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed an appropriate timeline within which it should comply with the stipulated limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be taken into account while computing exposure)
controls.control_description:
Failure to comply with the intra-group exposure limit
within the given timeline would result in deduction of excess exposure amount from
Common Equity Tier 1 (CET1) capital of bank until the limits are restored (If the limits
are breached on account of mark-to-market values of derivatives position, the excess
exposure would not be deducted from CET1 capital for a period of three months from
<image>
the date of breach, Further, in case of a foreign bank, proprietary derivative
transactions with parent and its overseas branches should also be taken into account
while computing exposure).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be taken into account while computing exposure)

controls.control_objective: To ensure also lead to imposition of penalties on the bank by the rbi
controls.control_description:
The frequent breaches may also lead to imposition of
penalties on the bank by the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also lead to imposition of penalties on the bank by the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - credit risk management) directions, 2025 for detailed instructions on country risk managemen
controls.control_description:
A bank shall refer to the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Credit Risk
Management) Directions, 2025 for detailed instructions on Country Risk Management,
Exposure limits
62.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - credit risk management) directions, 2025 for detailed instructions on country risk managemen

controls.control_objective: To ensure set country exposure limits in relation to the bank's regulatory capital (tier i + tier ii) with sub-limits
controls.control_description:
The Board of a bank shall set country exposure limits in relation to the bank's
regulatory capital (Tier I + Tier II) with sub-limits, if considered necessary for products,
branches, maturity etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set country exposure limits in relation to the bank's regulatory capital (tier i + tier ii) with sub-limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be left to the discretion of the banks' boards
controls.control_description:
The basis for setting the limits for the country / category shall be left
to the discretion of the banks' Boards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be left to the discretion of the banks' boards

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed periodically, and in any case, at least once a year
controls.control_description:
The country exposure limits set by the Board shall
be reviewed periodically, and in any case, at least once a year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed periodically, and in any case, at least once a year

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed its regulatory capital
controls.control_description:
Exposure limit for any country shall not exceed its regulatory capital, except in the
case of insignificant risk category.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed its regulatory capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the capital (tier i + tier ii) held in their indian books
controls.control_description:
In respect of foreign banks, the regulatory capital shall
be the capital (Tier I + Tier II) held in their Indian books.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the capital (tier i + tier ii) held in their indian books

controls.control_objective: To ensure also set up regional exposure limits for country groups, at the discretion of its board
controls.control_description:
A bank may also set up regional exposure limits for country groups, at the discretion
of its Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also set up regional exposure limits for country groups, at the discretion of its board

controls.control_objective: To ensure decide on the basis for grouping of countries and also lay down the guidelines regarding all aspects of such regional exposure limits
controls.control_description:
The Board shall decide on the basis for grouping of countries and also lay
down the guidelines regarding all aspects of such regional exposure limits.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to decide on the basis for grouping of countries and also lay down the guidelines regarding all aspects of such regional exposure limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure reckon both funded and non-funded exposures from their domestic as well as foreign branches while identifying, measuring, monitoring and controlling c
controls.control_description:
Banks should reckon both funded and non-funded exposures from their domestic as
well as foreign branches while identifying, measuring, monitoring and controlling country
risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reckon both funded and non-funded exposures from their domestic as well as foreign branches while identifying, measuring, monitoring and controlling c

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines repealed prior to the
issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under these
repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such
investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued, or enforced
and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those
directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the
provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect
of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these Directions
given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
